Great, so you can't sell people unless they actually pick up from phone. So maximizing pickups There's a couple key components here Speed is king is the first one So the the speed with which you contact someone after they opt in or after they sign up or after they schedule Will increase like or decrease the amount of work you have to do because more people will pick up immediately And you'll be able to close people to higher percentage because the proximity their pain is higher. Okay, so speed is king So have have like the moment you get these options. You should be calling them within five minutes minimum, okay? I'm telling you I can't say this enough like speed is king. All right After you do call Text them afterwards if they don't pick up just let them know who you are What you're looking to do that way they know when you call again who it is, right? And at the end of the day once you call multiple times you should be calling three attempts per day You want to video text and just say like hey, I'm Alex. I'm one of your transformation coach Just wanted to get you scheduled for your Orientation that you sign up for on Facebook, you know, just let me know a time that works well for you today And trying you today or a worst case tomorrow, right? Don't do anything past that because there's no point like they should be able to pick up the phone for ten minutes, right? This is a little bit of a tech thing But there's there's plugins that that allow you to just get a text immediately your cell phone right after you have an opt-in It's beyond the scope of this training But it's one of the ways that we use to optimize Speed of response and speed of sale from opt-ins. Okay, so the second thing is speed is king volume is king All right, so the amount of average temps will be directly proportional amount of sales you make period It's like it's like a law of sales the amount of average attempts you have is directly proportional amount of sales You know, okay So one of the tricks that we've noticed is that double dialing is very effective So when you make the call make a call right afterwards a lot of times we get a good pick up on that second call Cuz like I wonder who this is they're actually trying to get hold of me What a concept like if your mom doesn't pick up you call her again, right? Like when you're actually trying to get hold of someone usually you call more than once, right? Three of these double-dial attempts per day is usually sufficient and what's nice is that they actually stack up because if I you know I'm busy at one point I get I get two calls and then nothing and then I'm busy again later in the day And I get two calls by the third time when I'm at home. I'm like who is this person? I pick up the phone because I'm curious. I don't know who it is. Okay In terms of time of day eight to nine To my knowledge right now always follow whatever the legal guidelines are Is the legal time you can call I think it may depend on state So just check out what the legal whole times are but to my knowledge it's eight to nine p.m. That you can call people all right Great pickup rates in the afternoons, especially with some calls earlier than day So those earlier the day consider them like baking They're like baking in for pickups later. So just think about it that way if you are getting any like non pickups earlier the day It's still incredibly important to do them But usually you'll get the best pick up basically afternoon. Okay? This is from my test and put you're not bothering people Okay, and what I mean by that is that like cold calling people who did not opt in for something is bothering people That's spamming if someone opts in for a program and they check the box This is like you're allowed to contact me like they want they've said I would like this solution Can you tell me more about it? You are You're not bothering them They've asked you to call them if I was if I was suffering from something and someone had a solution I would want them to call me to get me out of that So you have to have this mindset when you're trying to meet these people is that you're trying to change this person's life And you're trying to reach them. That's why people who sell a day have Okay When you are talking on the phone you should be operating from an authoritative standpoint you should be prescribing the solution Why do we do this one? It will increase the closes closing percentage the second is this is an example I had one of our gym owners tell me that they they explained to their sales staff and I really liked it And she was like if I had cancer got forbidden, right? and I went to the the key of the oncologist, right and The doctor was like well do you want to do chemo two days a week or three days week? Do you want to do this this this dosing or this dosing? I'd be like, I don't know like That's why I'm here, right? So just prescribe what that person need just prescribe it to them because they don't know you are the expert you have far more Context of what's going to achieve results for this person than they do so Take charge people just want people to help them make these decisions because they don't have context All right, and then remember when you start the call don't act desperate Like listen, I got a lot of applications get through so I won't take a lot of your time So when you say that you're kind of stacking two things one is like listen We have scarcity to we have social proof because I've got a lot of people and the three I'm not gonna take a lot of your time. So when you put that sentence in it's important You nail it and you do it from a position of authority being like listen I got stuff to do not you guys have to do. Let's let's let's get this handle. All right, so these are the fundamentals Of how to maximize pickups. These are the best practices that we have found use them and you will benefit
